Dear Accounts Payable Team,

  Matter Reference: MER-2025-001

Warm regards,

Sarah M. Harrison
Managing Partner
Harrison & Cole LLP
1200 Market Street, Suite 800
Philadelphia, PA 19107

Dear Accounts Payable Team,

Please update our payment details as follows:

Bank Name: SouthState Bank
Routing Number: 053201814
Account Number: 7742-0085-1193

Best regards,
Brian Matthews
Office Manager
Pinnacle Print Services
bmatthews@pinnacleprint-services.com
(336) 555-0488

emails.subject: RE: Invoice SNC-2025-001 — IMMEDIATE PAYMENT REQUIRED — Legal Action Pending
emails.body_text:
To the Accounts Payable Department at Meridian Partners,

This is now the third time we are following up on invoice SNC-2025-001 in the amount of $15,000.00 for the annual penetration testing engagement completed on September 10, 2025. Our records indicate this invoice was submitted on September 11, 2025 and remains unpaid.

We have been informed by your office that this invoice is being held for an "audit review," but no explanation has been provided and no timeline for resolution has been given. This is unacceptable.

If full payment of $15,000.00 is not received or a confirmed payment date is not provided by close of business Friday, September 19, 2025, we will have no choice but to refer this matter to our legal counsel at Barton & Associates for collection proceedings. We will also be filing a formal complaint with the Better Business Bureau.

We expect an immediate response.

Derek Owens
Director of Client Services
SecureNet Compliance
billing@securenetcompliance.com
(512) 555-0111
